hero.desc: AOC rum, tokenized real estate, certified harvests, Creole art. Tokenized on XRP Ledger. Accessible from €100, from anywhere in the world.

rhum.desc: Aged rum barrels maturing in ancestral cellars. AOC certified, rare, uncorrelated.

art.desc: Co-own works by recognized Caribbean artists. Automatic royalties on every resale.

how.step1_desc: Browse our selection of verified Caribbean assets: rum, real estate, agriculture, art.
how.step2_desc: Our simulator calculates your projections in real time across 3 scenarios.
how.step3_desc: KYC, dedicated SPV, insured assets, XRPL blockchain. Your capital is protected.
how.step4_desc: Automatic distributions to your wallet. Resell your tokens at any time.

vision.label: Our vision

assets.rhum_desc: Aged rum barrels maturing in cellars
assets.rhum_note: Asset uncorrelated with financial markets. Historical return 8-15%/year.
assets.villa_note: Monthly income + real estate capital gain. Average occupancy rate 75%.
assets.local_desc: Signed commercial lease — guaranteed monthly rent
assets.local_note: Very low risk profile. Contractually guaranteed rent.
assets.agriculture_desc: Harvest financing — IGP banana, coffee, cocoa, FSC
assets.art_desc: Caribbean artists' works + royalties on resales
assets.art_note: 5-8% royalties on each secondary resale. High appreciation potential.

rhum.hero_desc: Invest in AOC agricultural rum barrels selected by our experts. Each barrel ages in the cellar and generates a historical return of 8 to 15% per year.
rhum.partenaires_desc: Guadeloupe & Martinique · AOC Certified · CaribbeanVault exclusive selection
rhum.territoires_desc: Click on a territory to discover its context and filter available barrels.
rhum.expansion_desc: Jamaica, Trinidad, Cuba, Dominican Rep., Barbados — planned launch 2027
rhum.etape1_desc: The rum is distilled from freshly pressed sugarcane, a unique characteristic of AOC agricultural rum.
rhum.etape2_desc: Each barrel is sealed, photographed, referenced. The SPV becomes the legal owner from this moment.
rhum.etape3_desc: In temperature-controlled cellars. Annual physical audit by an approved independent expert.
rhum.etape4_desc: At maturity, the barrel is auctioned or bottled. Proceeds are distributed to token holders.
rhum.rejoindre_desc: Get early access to new barrels, exclusive distillery visits and rare vintages.
rhum.rejoindre_note: Free · Application-based selection · No investment commitment

agri.hero_desc: Direct financing of real harvests: IGP banana, Bonifieur coffee, fine cocoa, FSC Guyanese forest. Each token represents a fraction of a verified, traceable and insured harvest.
agri.territoires_desc: Click on a territory to discover its agricultural context and filter available plots.
agri.expansion_desc: Haiti, Jamaica, Dominican Rep., Cuba, Trinidad — planned launch 2027
agri.certif_desc: Only farms holding at least one recognized certification are accepted on CaribbeanVault.
agri.processus_titre: From selection to your first return
agri.rejoindre_desc: Get early access to new plots, exclusive harvest reports and field visits with our partner producers.

art.hero_badge: Creole & Caribbean Art · Tokenized Works · 2025 Data
art.hero_desc: Co-own paintings and music rights by recognized Caribbean artists. Receive automatic royalties on every resale. Kelly Sinnapah Mary (Guadeloupe) just sold a work for $80,000 at Art Basel Miami Beach 2025.
art.hero_actu: 🏆 2025 NEWS — Kelly Sinnapah Mary: CPGA Prize Art Basel Miami · $80,000 · Guadeloupe
art.territoires_desc: Click on a card to discover artists, 2025 sales and market data. Then filter works by territory.

pourquoi.desc: 5% to 8% of every secondary sale distributed automatically to holders. Forever.
Each work authenticated, photographed and linked to a unique token on XRPL.
Invitations to private openings, artist studios and auctions.
You directly fund the creation of new Caribbean artistic projects.

art.citation_texte: This award represents an important recognition of marginal voices and narratives. My work seeks to build bridges between histories, geographies and identities that are often separated.

cgu.important: By accessing the CaribbeanVault platform, you accept these terms and conditions of use.
cgu.s1: These terms govern access to and use of the CaribbeanVault platform, accessible at caribbeanvault.geccostrategy.com.
cgu.s2: Access is restricted to adults who have completed the KYC process. CaribbeanVault reserves the right to refuse access without justification.
cgu.s3_intro: The platform offers the following services:
s3_items: Subscription to RWA tokens via dedicated SPV
s4_items: Not use the platform for unlawful purposes
cgu.s5_intro: The user acknowledges and accepts that:
s5_items: Investing in tokenized assets involves risks of capital loss
Past returns do not guarantee future performance
CaribbeanVault does not provide investment advice
cgu.s5_note: It is recommended not to invest more than 10% of your assets in alternative assets.
cgu.s6_intro: All elements of the platform (design, texts, algorithms) are protected by intellectual property law:
s6_items: Any reproduction is prohibited without written authorization
Scraping and automated data extraction are prohibited
cgu.s7: CaribbeanVault cannot be held liable for losses resulting from the use of the platform, fluctuations in the value of tokenized assets, or technical interruptions beyond its control.
s8_items: These terms may be modified at any time
Users are notified by email of material changes
Continued use constitutes acceptance of the new terms
cgu.s9: CaribbeanVault may suspend or terminate an account in the event of a breach of these terms, without notice or compensation.
cgu.s10: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute falls under the exclusive jurisdiction of French courts.

mentions.s3_p1: CaribbeanVault is a platform currently being registered as a Digital Asset Service Provider (DASP) with the French Financial Markets Authority (AMF).
mentions.s3_p2: Pending this registration, CaribbeanVault operates in a limited pilot phase, in compliance with the MiCA (Markets in Crypto-Assets) regulatory framework applicable in the European Union since 2024.
mentions.s3_p3: Tokens issued via the platform may constitute financial instruments within the meaning of the MiFID II regulation. Investors are advised to consult a financial advisor before investing.
mentions.s4_p1: All content on this site is the exclusive property of CaribbeanVault SAS and is protected by French and international intellectual property laws.
mentions.s4_p2: Any reproduction, representation or modification is prohibited without prior written authorization from CaribbeanVault SAS.
mentions.s5_p1: The information presented on this site is purely informational and does not constitute investment advice or financial recommendation.
mentions.s5_p2: Investing in tokenized digital or real assets involves risks, including partial or total loss of invested capital.
mentions.s6_p1: The processing of personal data collected on this site is governed by our
mentions.s6_p2: To exercise your rights, contact us at:
mentions.s7: This site uses technical cookies necessary for its operation. No advertising tracking cookies are used without your prior consent.
mentions.s8: This site and these legal notices are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, French courts shall have sole jurisdiction.

confidentialite.s1_engagement: CaribbeanVault SAS is committed to protecting the privacy of its users in accordance with GDPR (EU 2016/679) and the French Data Protection Act.
confidentialite.s2_inscription: first name, last name, email, date of birth, country of residence.
confidentialite.s2_kyc: official identity document, proof of address, verification selfie.
confidentialite.s2_usage: IP address, browser, pages visited, transaction history.
confidentialite.s4_intro: Your data may be shared with the following service providers strictly within the scope of their missions:
confidentialite.s4_note: No personal data is sold to third parties for commercial purposes.

s5_items.duree: 5 years after end of relationship (AML obligation)

confidentialite.s6_intro: Under GDPR, you have the following rights:

s6_droits.desc: Obtain a copy of your data
Receive your data in a structured format
Restrict the processing of your data

confidentialite.s6_cnil: You may also file a complaint with the CNIL (French data protection authority):

s7_items.desc: Necessary for operation. No consent required.
Anonymized audience measurement (Vercel Analytics). With consent only.
Remembering your choices. With consent only.

confidentialite.s7_note: No advertising or commercial tracking cookies are used on this site.
confidentialite.s8_intro: CaribbeanVault implements the following measures to protect your data:
s8_items: AES-256 encryption of sensitive data in the database
Restricted data access by authorized personnel
Regular security audits and penetration testing
